matches.reason: Isa 2:3-4 is a proper subset of the canticle Isaiah 2:2-5; identical Scripture text by design.

Pauline blessing formula "Бидний Эзэн Есүс Христийн Эцэг Тэнгэрбурхан ерөөлтэй еэ!" opens both 2 Cor 1:3 (this shortReading) and Eph 1:3 (canticle in psalter-texts). Parallel doctrinal formula, not contamination.
Saturday 1st-Vespers reuses Sunday 2nd-Vespers shortReading (liturgical pattern); same Pauline formula overlap as PSALTER/w1/SUN/vespers.
Ezek 36:25-28 (shortReading) is a proper subset of the canticle Ezekiel 36:24-28; identical Scripture text by design.

verified_corrections.note: Psalm 117:1-2 tail ("Бүх үндэстэн, ЭЗЭНийг магтагтун Бүх ард түмэн, Түүнийг өргөмжлөгтүн!") had been appended to 2 Петр 1:10-11 text during transcription; removed. Rich builder acceptance gate now PASS.

Spurious stanza ["Эзэн Есүс Христийг өөртөө өмс. Хүсэл тачаалыг нь хангах юугаар ч махбодыг бүү тэтгэ."] was inserted between legitimate stanzas[2] and stanzas[4] in Psalm 33:1-9 body. Content is Romans 13:14, unrelated to psalm. Removed. PDF p96-98 has no such line.

verified_corrections.bled_from: Easter antiphon ("Амилалтын цаг улирал…Аллэлуяа!") + prophetic formula fragment ("сайхнаар хангалуун байх болно гэж ЭЗЭН тунхаглаж байна.")
verified_corrections.note: Psalm body stanza[1] had two intruder elements: (a) a prophetic-formula tail grafted to legitimate line "Үүрийн гэгээг би сэрээнэ." and (b) an Easter-season antiphon line. Both removed. Simultaneously, the psalm body was truncated (ended at Ps 57:8); Ps 57:9-12 (PDF p126 lines 4155-4163) restored verbatim.
